subcodes.first_line: O Persian friends of 'Abdu'l-Bahá! Every clime hath its ancient inhabitants as foundation and wellspring, and upon every land [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران پارسی عبدالبهاء هر اقلیم اهالی قدیم را بن و بنگاه و بر هر کشور
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @praise and encouragement, @Zoroastrianism; Mahabad and Zoroaster, @thankfulness; gratitude, @love and unity
